ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. Clear and legible. ORIGINAL certificate, 1 page.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. 5 pages. Clear and legible.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026. Invoice file contains invoice number 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026. Consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer SKF Eurotrade AB. Pairing is unambiguous.

criteria_met: Invoice number 8500030660 in certificate matches invoice number 8500030660 in invoice file
Consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer SKF Eurotrade AB
Consignee PC Prompodshipnik matches Bill to/Sold to/Ship to PC Prompodshipnik

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-465612 does not contain an LC bank-term reference as a separate label.

locations: Invoice page 1: header 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 1: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice pages 2-5: repeated in header and footer as 'SKF Eurotrade AB'

comparison_steps.description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – SKF Eurotrade AB found directly in invoice header, Issued by field, and footer on all pages
Name: SKF Eurotrade AB exactly matches. Country: Sweden in certificate matches Sweden in invoice.
Country Sweden confirmed via explicit address 'Sweden', IBAN prefix SE, and phone prefix +46.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly in invoice
Verification of company name and country

normalizations_applied: Case normalization: GÖTEBORG → Goteborg (minor diacritical/case difference, same city)

evidence.description: Certificate consignor: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'
Invoice issuer: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'SKF Eurotrade AB' at '415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice is issued by 'SKF Eurotrade AB' at '415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'. The company name is identical. The address differs only in GÖTEBORG vs Goteborg (diacritical mark on Ö, allowed normalization). Country is Sweden in both. Direct match via 4.1.0 — name found in invoice header on every page. MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 GÖTEBORG, Sweden kan identifieras direkt i fakturans sidhuvud som SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden. Företagsnamnet är identiskt, land överensstämmer (Sweden). MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE
consignee.invoice_value: PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine (Bill to / Sold to / Ship to)

comparison_steps.description: Priority order for consignee identification – check primary billing fields first
comparison_steps.result: Bill to field found: 'PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine'. Also Sold to and Ship to fields with same party.
PC Prompodshipnik in certificate matches PC Prompodshipnik in invoice Bill to/Sold to/Ship to fields.
UKRAINE in certificate matches Ukraine in invoice. Case normalization applied.

rules_applied.description: Priority order – Bill to field identified as primary

evidence.description: Certificate consignee: 'PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE'
Invoice Bill to: 'PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine'

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'PC Prompodshipnik' at '7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE'. Invoice Bill to, Sold to, and Ship to all state 'PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine'. Company name is identical. Address is identical. Country matches (UKRAINE vs Ukraine, case normalization). MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare PC Prompodshipnik, 7 Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE matchar exakt fakturans Bill to/Sold to/Ship to: PC Prompodshipnik, 7 Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine. Företagsnamn, adress och land överensstämmer. MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Bearings,seals,lubricants
For detailed description refer to the invoice
8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026
goods_description.invoice_value: LUBRICANTS, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG (Invoice 8500030660, dated 24.02.2026)

comparison_steps.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate contains general description with explicit invoice reference
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' with 'For detailed description refer to the invoice 8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026'. Invoice number 8500030660 and date 24.02.2026 match exactly. The expression 'refer to the invoice' is an explicit invoice reference.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that invoice content is consistent with certificate description
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG (bearings), RADIAL SHAFT SEALS (seals), and LUBRICANTS (lubricants). All categories match certificate's 'Bearings,seals,lubricants'. Consistent.
Certificate contains a reference to the invoice for detailed description. The invoice clearly assigns origin per article line. This satisfies the requirement per 4.3.7.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – invoice reference and date match, explicit reference phrase present
Koppling vara–ursprungsland – certificate references invoice for detailed description, invoice provides per-article origin

evidence.description: Certificate goods description: 'Bearings,seals,lubricants / For detailed description refer to the invoice 8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026'
Invoice number 8500030660, date 24.02.2026, containing LUBRICANTS, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG

rejected_hypotheses.reason: Certificate lists package tracking numbers (298621735 etc.) which are transport package numbers, not product article numbers. The certificate does not list specific product article/SKU numbers. Prioritet 1 is not applicable — proceed to Prioritet 3 (generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens).

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate uses a generell varubeskrivning 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' and explicitly references invoice 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026 with the phrase 'For detailed description refer to the invoice'. Per rule 4.3.5, this is a valid generell varubeskrivning with fakturareferens. The invoice number and date match exactly. The invoice content (bearings, seals, lubricants) is fully consistent with the certificate description. The numbers listed in the certificate (298621735, 445787638, etc.) are transport package numbers, confirmed by invoice page 5 which lists the same numbers under 'Transport package number(s)'. These are NOT article numbers. Per 4.3.7, the certificate references the invoice for detailed description, and the invoice provides per-article origin. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatet anger en generell varubeskrivning 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' med uttrycklig hänvisning till faktura 8500030660 daterad 24.02.2026. Fakturanumret och datumet matchar exakt. Fakturans innehåll (lager, tätningar, smörjmedel) är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning. MATCH enligt regel 4.3.5.

quantity.certificate_value: GW in KGs 598,102 / NW in KGs 493,829
quantity.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG / Total Net Weight 493,829 KG

comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains: GW in KGs 598,102 and NW in KGs 493,829. Both have explicit numerical value, unit (KGs) and weight category (GW/NW).
Certificate GW 598,102 KG → Invoice Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG. Certificate NW 493,829 KG → Invoice Total Net Weight 493,829 KG. Both match exactly.
Invoice page 5 states Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG and Total Net Weight 493,829 KG. Both values and units match certificate exactly.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 values are verifieringsgrundande – GW in KGs 598,102 and NW in KGs 493,829
Numerical value verification – both GW and NW match exactly
Total weight in invoice – Total Gross Weight and Total Net Weight fields on invoice page 5

normalizations_applied: Decimal notation: Certificate uses comma as decimal separator (598,102). Invoice uses comma as decimal separator (598,102). Same notation, no conversion needed.

evidence.description: Certificate quantity box 7: 'GW in KGs 598,102' and 'NW in KGs 493,829'
Invoice: 'Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG' and 'Total Net Weight 493,829 KG'

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states GW in KGs 598,102 and NW in KGs 493,829. Invoice page 5 states Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG and Total Net Weight 493,829 KG. Both GW and NW are exact matches. Weight category (GW/NW) is explicitly stated in both documents. Unit (KG/KGs) matches. No tolerance calculation needed — values are identical. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatet anger GW 598,102 KGs och NW 493,829 KGs. Fakturan anger Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG och Total Net Weight 493,829 KG. Båda värden, enheter och viktkategorier överensstämmer exakt. MATCH.

country_of_origin.certificate_value: AT FR JP MX PL SE
country_of_origin.invoice_value: Austria (AT), France (FR), Japan (JP), Mexico (MX), Poland (PL), Sweden (SE) — per Country of manufacturing column

comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 1 has 'Country of manufacturing' column listing: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden. Invoice pages 3-4 have per-line 'Country of manufacturing' with codes: JP, AT, MX, FR, SE, PL.

comparison_steps.description: Normalize country codes to full names
comparison_steps.result: AT=Austria, FR=France, JP=Japan, MX=Mexico, PL=Poland, SE=Sweden. All are ISO alpha-2 codes.

comparison_steps.description: Verify each certificate origin country in invoice
comparison_steps.result: AT → Austria in invoice: FOUND. FR → France in invoice: FOUND. JP → Japan in invoice: FOUND. MX → Mexico in invoice: FOUND. PL → Poland in invoice: FOUND. SE → Sweden in invoice: FOUND. All 6 countries verified.

comparison_steps.description: Check for non-certificate origins in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains exactly Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden as origin countries. Certificate lists AT, FR, JP, MX, PL, SE. All invoice origins are covered by certificate. No extra origins in invoice that are absent from certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Check for non-EU origins in invoice not in certificate
comparison_steps.result: Non-EU origins in invoice: Japan, Mexico. Certificate lists JP, MX. Both are covered. No MISMATCH.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in 'Country of manufacturing' column in invoice
ISO alpha-2 normalization: AT→Austria, FR→France, JP→Japan, MX→Mexico, PL→Poland, SE→Sweden
All certificate origins can be explicitly identified in invoice

normalizations_applied: ISO alpha-2 to full country name: AT→Austria, FR→France, JP→Japan, MX→Mexico, PL→Poland, SE→Sweden

evidence.description: Certificate country of origin box 3: 'AT FR JP MX PL SE'
Invoice Country of manufacturing: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden
evidence.source: Invoice page 1, Country of manufacturing column

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: EU normalization needed for AT, FR, PL, SE
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Not needed. Each specific country is listed individually in both certificate and invoice. No EU collective term used in either document for origin field (note: the EU preferential origin statement on invoice page 5 is a separate declaration, not an origin field). Direct country-to-country matching is sufficient.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 lists 'AT FR JP MX PL SE' as countries of origin (ISO alpha-2 codes). Invoice has a 'Country of manufacturing' column on page 1 listing Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden, and per-line country codes on pages 3-4 (JP, AT, MX, FR, SE, PL). Each certificate origin is found: AT=Austria ✓, FR=France ✓, JP=Japan ✓, MX=Mexico ✓, PL=Poland ✓, SE=Sweden ✓. The invoice does not introduce any additional origin countries beyond those in the certificate. All 6 origins verified. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsländerna AT, FR, JP, MX, PL, SE. Fakturan listar Country of manufacturing: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden. Alla sex länder återfinns uttryckligen i fakturan via ISO-landkodsnormalisering. Inga ytterligare ursprungsländer finns i fakturan utöver de som certifikatet anger. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate

Certificate file (Document A page 1) paired with Invoice file (Document B pages 1-5). Certificate file also contains invoice pages (pages 2-6) but per rule 8.5.0, verification uses invoice from the separate invoice file (Document B).
PASS – all three criteria met: invoice number matches, consignor matches, consignee matches
MATCH – SKF Eurotrade AB found directly in invoice
Bill to field identified with PC Prompodshipnik
MATCH – invoice number and date match, explicit reference phrase, content consistent
MATCH – certificate references invoice for detailed description, invoice assigns origin per article
GW 598,102 KGs and NW 493,829 KGs identified

rule_evaluation_log.description: Quantity verification – exact match for both GW and NW

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Country of manufacturing column found with 6 countries
All 6 codes normalized to full country names

rule_evaluation_log.description: Origin verification – all certificate origins found in invoice

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren SKF Eurotrade AB i Sverige, mottagaren PC Prompodshipnik i Ukraina, varubeskrivningen (lager, tätningar, smörjmedel med fakturahänvisning), vikterna (598,102 kg brutto och 493,829 kg netto) samt alla sex ursprungsländer (Österrike, Frankrike, Japan, Mexiko, Polen, Sverige) kan verifieras exakt mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values are above 0.85 threshold.
